name: Used Study Table
description: Wooden study table, slightly used but still in good condition. Ideal for students or home offices, with a smooth surface for writing or using a laptop. Minimal scratches on the edges that do not affect functionality. Sturdy legs and lightweight enough to move easily. Perfect for small rooms or study corners.

name: Office Chair
description: Ergonomic office chair with cushion, gently used. Features a comfortable padded seat, backrest support, and adjustable height for optimal posture. Smooth swivel base and wheels make it easy to move around your workspace. The chair has minor wear but remains very functional, perfect for home or office use.

name: Bookshelf
description: Three-tier wooden bookshelf, with minor scratches that add character but do not compromise durability. Provides ample storage for books, decor, or office supplies. Sturdy and stable, easy to assemble and fits well in bedrooms, living rooms, or offices. Lightweight yet strong enough to hold heavy books or collectibles.

name: Laptop Stand
description: Aluminum adjustable laptop stand in like-new condition. Lightweight, foldable, and portable, suitable for working at home, office, or school. Adjustable angles for ergonomic typing and better screen visibility. Durable and rust-resistant aluminum with rubber pads to prevent slipping or scratching surfaces.

name: Dining Chair Set
description: Set of 4 wooden dining chairs, solidly built and slightly used. Each chair has a smooth finish, comfortable seating, and stable legs. Perfect for family meals or small dining spaces. Minimal wear from previous use, but structurally intact and ready for immediate use. Timeless design that matches most dining tables.

name: Coffee Table
description: Glass-top coffee table with a stylish and modern design. Minimal wear with some light scratches on the glass, easily polished. Sturdy frame provides stability, perfect for living rooms, lounges, or offices. Offers a functional and decorative centerpiece for your space, ideal for holding books, drinks, or decor items.

name: Wardrobe
description: 2-door wooden wardrobe with shelves, in good condition. Offers ample storage for clothes, accessories, and personal items. Durable construction with easy-to-use handles and smooth sliding doors. Minimal scratches from normal use. Suitable for bedrooms of all sizes, keeps your space organized and clutter-free.

name: TV Stand
description: Wooden TV stand with two drawers and open shelves, lightly used. Provides space for a TV, media players, and accessories. Sturdy construction with smooth finish, easy to clean. Drawers glide smoothly and shelves can accommodate books, gaming consoles, or decorative items. Perfect for living rooms or entertainment areas.

name: Recliner Chair
description: Leather recliner chair with minor scratches on the surface, otherwise in good condition. Comfortable cushioning with adjustable reclining feature for maximum relaxation. Sturdy frame supports regular use and the chair is easy to clean. Ideal for living rooms, reading corners, or home theaters. Adds style and comfort to any space.

name: Nightstand Update
description: Small wooden nightstand in like-new condition. Compact yet functional, with a drawer and open shelf for storage. Smooth surface ideal for a lamp, clock, or books. Minimal signs of use and durable construction. Perfect for bedrooms or guest rooms, providing convenient bedside storage and easy organization.
